description: The PagingControl component allows for counting up a number of items specified, then outputs it to either a Text or TextRenderer component.

fields.ItemsPerPage: The increment to count up by.
fields.HasMoreItems: Allows to count beyond the max set of items.
fields.SkipItems: Skips items that are listed here.
fields.NoItemsLabel: Shows the output as this when there are no items.
fields.PagingInfoLabel: The structure of how the items will be shown to the user.
fields.RemainingItems: Shows how many items are remaining.
fields._previousEnabled: Becomes false if the minimum is currently reached.
fields._nextEnabled: Becomes false if the maximum is currently reached.

methods.NextPage: Switches to the next page via action.
methods.PreviousPage: Switches to the previous page via action.

usage: Great for counting items, and for controlling UI that can switch pages.
